backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores health records in a persistent Map, exposes addRecord/getAllRecords/getRecordById endpoints, and computes a 0–100 risk score from clinical inputs (age, BMI, BP, glucose, hemoglobin, cholesterol, smoking).
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the old and new actor state shapes (both using a Map of HealthRecord) and provides a run function that passes records through unchanged during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the RiskPredictor.tsx file to the requirement of calling useAddRecord on form submission to persist predictions to the backend.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (/, /xray, /dashboard, /history) inside a sidebar layout with a sticky header and footer.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Sidebar navigation component with logo, four nav links (Risk Predictor, X-Ray Analysis, Dashboard, History) with active-state highlighting, and a disclaimer notice in the footer.
frontend/src/components/RiskGauge.tsx: Canvas-based semicircular gauge that renders a color-coded arc, needle, and score percentage for a given 0–100 risk score and LOW/MODERATE/HIGH level.
Horizontal progress-bar chart displaying Normal vs Pneumonia probability percentages with green and red color coding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all health records (useGetAllRecords) and adding a new health record (useAddRecord) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a clinical navy/teal color palette with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes and risk-level utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/riskCalculator.ts: Implements a health risk scoring algorithm that calculates a 0–100 risk score from patient vitals and classifies it as LOW, MODERATE, or HIGH, with helper functions for risk colors and CSS classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that displays aggregate statistics and a table of all patient health records fetched on-chain, with risk badges, refresh, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: History page that displays all health records sorted by timestamp as individual cards, each showing patient vitals, risk score, risk level badge, and lifestyle indicators.
frontend/src/pages/RiskPredictor.tsx: React page that renders a health risk prediction form (age, BMI, blood pressure, glucose, etc.), computes a risk score via `calculateRiskScore`, displays a color-coded gauge, and saves the record to the backend using the `useAddRecord` hook.
frontend/src/pages/XRayAnalysis.tsx: React page that accepts a chest X-ray image upload (drag-and-drop or file picker), simulates a Normal/Pneumonia classification with a random confidence score, and displays the image alongside a result chart and medical disclaimer.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility that converts an array of `HealthRecord` objects into a CSV string (including computed risk level) and triggers a browser file download.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (navy, teal, health-green/amber/red, risk levels), typography/display font families, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for the project.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 5) describing the AI Preventive Healthcare platform's architecture, existing implemented features (Risk Predictor, X-Ray Analysis, Dashboard, History), and known build issues.
